item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-07 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+7 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] hpcaitech/ColossalAI (+3 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Distributed Training & Inference Infrastructure Description: Colossal-AI is an open-source deep learning system that makes large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible through advanced parallelism and heterogeneous memory management. Why it matters: The repo has a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 6 (high), despite a low 7-day average star delta of -0.6. With 41,385 total stars and 4,505 forks, it's a well-established project that recently saw a spike in attention, possibly due to new benchmarks (B200 GPUs showing 50-70% throughput gains) or the release of Open-Sora and DeepSeek fine-tuning guides. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward democratizing large model training: developers can now achieve near-linear scaling on multi-GPU setups with minimal code changes, reducing the barrier to entry for building foundation models. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] gvergnaud/ts-pattern (+3 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: TS-Pattern brings exhaustive, type-safe pattern matching to TypeScript, enabling concise and readable branching on complex data structures with smart type inference. Why it matters: The repo shows a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 3 (high), gaining 4 stars in the last 24 hours and maintaining a 7-day average of 1.5 stars/day. With 15,022 total stars and only 166 forks, the star-to-fork ratio is extremely high, indicating broad interest. The recent commit within 7 days and the sudden acceleration suggest renewed attention, possibly from a viral post or community highlight. Developer insight: This signals a growing demand for functional programming patterns in TypeScript, especially for frontend state management. AI developers building type-safe agents or data pipelines can leverage TS-Pattern for robust branching logic. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+1137 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1137，前 3 日均值 437.3，加速度 2.6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Leonxlnx/taste-skill (+1465 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1465，总 stars 59,254，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+10804 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +10804，总 stars 49,916，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+724 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +724，总 stars 34,500，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+727 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +727，总 stars 52,181，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1635 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1635，前 3 日均值 779，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] alibaba/zvec (+2402 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2402，总 stars 13,610，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] headroomlabs-ai/headroom (+357 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +357，总 stars 57,216，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] HKUDS/nanobot (+46 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向一周增长 +220，属于持续升温信号。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
